form.formComment: Hit the ground running and set it up early clocking 16.77 with a 3 length win at this track over 300m. Has won three races from this draw. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.68) at Taree Super Track in a NG, finishing fourth and beaten 9 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and two places from six starts. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 300m in 16.59. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 300m at this track at Free For All level. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Scored by a neck last time (17.13) in a Grade 4/5 over 300m at this track. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Showed strong pace early but found one better when a 4 length second over 300m this track in 17.11. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.
